title: kagent-crds values
description: Dependency-wrapper for the upstream kagent-crds chart. No tunables of its own; passes through to the upstream subchart.

global.title: Global values
global.description: Helm global values propagated to the upstream subchart.

kagent-crds.title: Upstream kagent-crds passthrough
kagent-crds.description: Values forwarded to the upstream kagent-crds subchart (e.g. kmcp.enabled).
